'''''Corvalis''''' was a [[Golan Space Colony 1]] located in the [[Nezni system/Legends|Nezni system]]. The station, along with [[Henlon Station|Henlon station]] was the location of an incident between the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and the [[Hurrim]]. A civilian convoy from a company called [[Toburik Haulers]] was attacked by both the Rebels and the Hurrim. The objective was to capture the cargo and leave the [[Starship/Legends|ships]] intact. However, as soon as the ships lowered their shields, the Hurrim showed their true [[Color/Legends|colors]] and began firing upon the civilians. The Rebels managed to drive the Hurrim away and capture the cargo, but they were worried about the outcome of this incident.

A number of ships were present during the incident, including the ''[[Suili]]'', a [[C-3 passenger liner]], the [[Personal Luxury Yacht 3000/Legends|Personal Luxury Yacht 3000]] ''[[Amberhawk]]'', ''[[Bentor]]'', a [[Muurian transport]], and the [[Riley (transport)|''Riley'']], [[Action VI bulk transport/Legends|Action VI transport]].
